case_id: Five containment area scenarios with chemical mixing pairs

pi_items.source: CAMEO Chemicals NOAA database (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/4503) states 'May produce explosive chloroamines with amines'; chemical reactivity principle confirms hypochlorites react with amines to form chloroamines

CAMEO Chemicals NOAA (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/4477) confirms 'reacts with acids...to give off hydrogen cyanide, a flammable poison gas'; balanced equation NaCN + H2SO4 → Na2SO4 + HCN confirmed by multiple chemistry sources

CAMEO Chemicals NOAA (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/9084) confirms 'on contact with acids sodium sulfide liberates highly toxic and flammable hydrogen sulfide gas'; general acid-base principle with sulfides verified by multiple chemistry references

CAMEO Chemicals NOAA (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/3598) confirms hydrochloric acid 'reacts with many metals...to generate flammable hydrogen gas'; balanced equation Zn + 2HCl → ZnCl2 + H2 confirmed by multiple chemistry sources and MEL Chemistry

pi_items.verified_value: Produces sulfur dioxide (SO2) primarily; nitrogen oxides (NO2/NOx) produced with concentrated nitric acid
pi_items.source: CAMEO Chemicals NOAA (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/9514) states sodium bisulfite 'Emits highly toxic gaseous sulfur dioxide gas when heated to decomposition or on contact with mineral acids'; chemistry references confirm SO2 as primary product and NO2 as secondary product with concentrated HNO3; reaction with nitrogen oxides also documented in absorption studies

pi_items.metadata_value: Uses CAMEO Chemicals web application at https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/reactivity
pi_items.verified_value: CAMEO Chemicals is a real, publicly accessible NOAA/EPA tool for chemical hazard prediction and reactivity information
pi_items.source: Direct access to https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/ confirmed; tool exists and operates as described in task instructions

privileged_info_summary: The task presents five real chemical mixing scenarios based on CAMEO Chemicals (NOAA/EPA) reactivity data. All expected gas products are chemically accurate: (1) Sodium hypochlorite + ammonia produces chloramine, (2) Sodium cyanide + sulfuric acid produces hydrogen cyanide, (3) Sodium sulfide + formic acid produces hydrogen sulfide, (4) Zinc powder + hydrochloric acid produces hydrogen gas, (5) Sodium bisulfite + nitric acid produces sulfur dioxide and potentially nitrogen oxides. The data is non-synthetic and sourced from real chemical reactivity principles documented in the CAMEO Chemicals NOAA database. The task requires agents to use the actual CAMEO Chemicals web tool to look up reactivity information for these documented chemical pairs.
